Our Services

SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Horizon Solar: San Diego's Solar Specialists

Founded in 2012, Horizon Solar began with a mission to bring reliable renewable energy to San Diego neighborhoods. Our team of local installers understands the unique challenges of coastal installations and inland heat.

We combine premium equipment with precision engineering to maximize energy production in San Diego's microclimates. Every system is tailored to your roof type, whether it's a La Jolla cottage or Scripps Ranch estate.

As active members of the San Diego Green Building Council, we're committed to sustainable growth that preserves our region's natural beauty while reducing energy costs for homeowners.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Solar

Climate-Adapted Designs

Systems engineered for salt air corrosion resistance and wildfire-prone areas with specialized mounting solutions.

Local Expertise

12 years serving San Diego County means we know every permit process and utility requirement.

Premium Warranties

25-year performance guarantees backed by manufacturers we've vetted for coastal durability.

Neighborhood Knowledge

We've installed on every roof type from North Park bungalows to Del Mar contemporary homes.

See Your Solar Potential

Get a free assessment of your home's energy savings with our San Diego-specific calculator.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-sol-rq6

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Horizon designed a perfect system for our 1940s Craftsman in North Park - they custom-fabricated low-profile mounts that preserved our roof's historic lines while maximizing production. Even during June gloom, we're producing more than projected.

Mikael R. Residential Solar Installation
“

When the power went out during last October's Santa Anas, our Powerwall kept the lights on for 3 days straight. Horizon's team configured it to prioritize our home office and refrigerator - exactly what we needed during the outage.

Sophia K. Solar Battery Storage
“

Living in Ocean Beach means constant salt exposure. Horizon's quarterly maintenance caught corroding connectors before they failed. Their technician even noticed seagull nesting attempts under our panels and installed humane deterrents.

Carlos T. Solar Maintenance
“

After a windstorm loosened panels on our Del Mar home, Horizon had a crew out same-day. They discovered the original installers used inland-grade hardware - replaced everything with marine-certified parts at no extra charge.

Danielle P. Solar Panel Repair
“

Our Scripps Ranch home went from $200/month gas bills to $35 after Horizon's solar water heater install. The system seamlessly integrates with our existing tankless heater for those rare cloudy stretches.

Rajesh V. Solar Water Heating
“

Horizon navigated La Jolla's strict HOA requirements beautifully - our panels are invisible from the street but produce 120% of our needs. Their knowledge of coastal microclimates resulted in better production than three competing proposals.

Lisa M. Residential Solar Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you handle HOA approvals in communities like La Jolla?
We've successfully navigated approvals with all major San Diego HOAs, providing aesthetic renderings and technical specifications that meet community standards while maximizing efficiency.
What's different about solar installations near the coast?
We use stainless steel hardware and anti-corrosion coatings on all coastal installations, plus additional wind-load calculations for beachfront properties.
